name: Djinn Disserere of Rituals
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>儀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>式</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>人</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ディザーズ
desc: When you Ritual Summon a monster, you can banish this card from your GY as 1 of the monsters required for the Ritual Summon. The monster Ritual Summoned using this card is unaffected by Trap effects.
mnst_eff: When you Ritual Summon a monster, you can banish this card from your GY as 1 of the monsters required for the Ritual Summon. The monster Ritual Summoned using this card is unaffected by Trap effects.
eff: When you Ritual Summon a monster, you can banish this card from your GY as 1 of the monsters required for the Ritual Summon. The monster Ritual Summoned using this card is unaffected by Trap effects.

sets.set: Speed Duel: Attack from the Deep
Speed Duel Starter Decks: Match of the Millennium

action: Applies effect when used for a Ritual Summon
banished: Banishes monsters from Graveyard for Ritual Summon
